title: Flows, faster search, and a calmer inbox

body.text: This release focuses on the everyday loop: building flows, finding requests, and keeping notifications out of your way.
Drag-and-drop reordering in the flow and script block editors.
Sidebar search now matches request names and URLs as you type.
Notifications no longer re-appear after being marked as read.
Dropped the legacy v1 API surface.

items: Open a flow and add a Call step.
Capture a value from its response into a flow variable.
Drag steps to reorder them, then press Run.

body.text: Flow runs are client-side and reuse the same send pipeline as a normal request, so behaviour matches exactly.

items: Faster cold start on large workspaces.
Clearer error messages for unresolved variables.
Keyboard focus is restored after closing a dialog.
